Third-Party Notice: WinDivert

This distribution contains unmodified official precompiled
and pre-signed WinDivert binaries.

Project:
WinDivert

Copyright:
Copyright (C) Basil 2011-2022

Redistribution License:
GNU Lesser General Public License v3.0 (LGPLv3)

Component(s):
WinDivert.dll
WinDivert64.sys
WinDivert32.sys

Source:
https://github.com/basil00/WinDivert

Notes:
WinDivert is an optional runtime-loaded component used only
for rawpacket finalmask on Windows platforms on x86
platform or on x86-64 platform.

This distribution redistributes WinDivert under the LGPLv3
license option provided by the upstream project.
